executives.name: Govind Friedland
executives.background: Mr. Friedland is a geologist and the founder of GoviEx Uranium. He has been involved in the mining industry for over 20 years and has been instrumental in the acquisition and development of the company's uranium assets in Africa.

executives.name: Marc-Antoine Audet
executives.background: Mr. Audet has over 15 years of experience in finance and the mining industry. He previously served as Vice President, Corporate Development and Investor Relations at G Mining Ventures. He holds a Bachelor of Commerce from HEC Montréal and is a CFA charterholder.

executives.name: Richard Quesnel
executives.background: Mr. Quesnel is a mining engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He has held senior executive positions with several mining companies, including serving as President and CEO of Consolidated Thompson Iron Mines Ltd. and as a director of several other public companies.
